message:
✨ Add unified controls, cluster status indicators, and AI agent improvements (#583)

* 🐛 Fix demo mode architecture and documentation

- Remove llmd_benchmarks and llmd_ai_insights from DEMO_DATA_CARDS set
- These cards now use StackContext for live data
- Add comprehensive documentation for demo mode architecture
- Document the three layers that can cause demo badge to show

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add unified framework controls to LLMModels card

- Add search input for filtering models
- Add cluster filter dropdown
- Add additional sort options (namespace, cluster, status)
- Use storageKey for persisting filter state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add unified framework controls to AI-ML cards

- MLJobs: Add sort options (name, status, framework, gpus)
- MLNotebooks: Add search, sort options (name, user, status)
- LLMdStackMonitor: Add search and cluster filter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add unified controls and cluster status to llm-d Stack Monitor

- Add hover text explaining "X/Y components" format (healthy/total)
- Add diagnose/repair icons for non-healthy items (always visible)
- Wire diagnose icons to start AI-powered diagnosis for specific items
- Add cluster status indicators (online/offline/auth/degraded) to dropdown
- Add unified search, pagination, sort controls to:
  - GPUOverview (search)
  - ProwHistory (sort controls)
  - GitHubCIMonitor (sort controls)
  - ProwCIMonitor (sort controls)
- Dynamic cluster discovery for llm-d using keyword patterns and GPU nodes
- Expand namespace detection patterns for pok-prod clusters

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Improve AI agent integration and cluster status indicators

- Update API key check to support CLI-based agents (bob, claude-code)
- Check for any available agent, not just API key in localStorage
- Update modal text to reflect AI agent selection (not just API key)
- Add cluster status indicators to unified CardClusterFilter dropdown
  - Show online/offline/degraded/auth-needed status per cluster
  - Use ClusterStatusDot component for visual indicators
- Create new chat bubbles when AI pauses for tool use
  - Detect 2+ second gaps in streaming to identify tool execution
  - Start new message bubble after tool use instead of appending

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add cluster status indicators to all unified card cluster filters

- Add ClusterWithHealth type for clusters with health info
- Update CardClusterFilter to show status dots (green/yellow/red) per cluster
- Update useCardFilters to expose cluster health info to filter dropdown
- All cards using the unified cluster filter now show cluster status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,20 +3,40 @@
  * state (isFailed, consecutiveFailures) up to the parent CardWrapper, which
  * renders the appropriate status badges (failure, demo fallback, etc.).
  *
- * Usage inside a card component:
+ * ## Demo Mode Architecture
  *
- *   const { isFailed, consecutiveFailures } = useCachedPodIssues()
- *   useReportCardDataState({ isFailed, consecutiveFailures })
+ * There are THREE ways a card can be marked as "demo":
  *
- * For cards that need to determine whether to use demo data:
+ * 1. **DEMO_DATA_CARDS set** (cardRegistry.ts) - Static list of cards that ALWAYS use demo data.
+ *    These get `isDemoData={true}` passed as a prop, which OVERRIDES child reports.
+ *    → When adding live data support, REMOVE the card from this set!
  *
- *   const { shouldUseDemoData, reason } = useCardDemoState({
- *     requires: 'agent',           // 'agent' | 'backend' | 'stack' | 'none'
- *     isLiveDataAvailable: true,   // Set to false if endpoint returned 404/error
- *   })
- *   if (shouldUseDemoData) {
- *     // Use local demo data
- *   }
+ * 2. **Global demo mode** (useDemoMode) - User/system-wide toggle (forced on Netlify).
+ *    Cards can opt-out by reporting `isDemoData: false` via useReportCardDataState.
+ *
+ * 3. **Child-reported state** - Cards call useReportCardDataState({ isDemoData: ... })
+ *    to dynamically report based on actual data source availability.
+ *
+ * ## Usage Examples
+ *
+ * ### Card with cached data hook:
+ * ```tsx
+ * const { isFailed, consecutiveFailures } = useCachedPodIssues()
+ * useReportCardDataState({ isFailed, consecutiveFailures })
+ * ```
+ *
+ * ### Card with stack-dependent data (llm-d cards):
+ * ```tsx
+ * const { shouldUseDemoData } = useCardDemoState({ requires: 'stack' })
+ * useReportCardDataState({ isDemoData: shouldUseDemoData, isFailed: false, consecutiveFailures: 0 })
+ * // Then use shouldUseDemoData to decide data source
+ * ```
+ *
+ * ### Card with agent-dependent data:
+ * ```tsx
+ * const { shouldUseDemoData } = useCardDemoState({ requires: 'agent' })
+ * useReportCardDataState({ isDemoData: shouldUseDemoData, isFailed: false, consecutiveFailures: 0 })
+ * ```
  */
 
 import { createContext, useContext, useLayoutEffect, useMemo } from 'react'

@@ -373,8 +373,20 @@ export const CARD_COMPONENTS: Record<string, CardComponent> = Object.fromEntries
 )
 
 /**
- * Cards that use demo/mock data instead of real data.
- * Used to show a demo banner when these cards are present.
+ * Cards that ALWAYS use demo/mock data (no live data source exists).
+ *
+ * IMPORTANT: When adding live data support to a card, you MUST:
+ * 1. Remove the card type from this set
+ * 2. Have the card call useReportCardDataState({ isDemoData: shouldUseDemoData, ... })
+ *    to dynamically report its demo state based on actual data source
+ *
+ * Cards in this set get isDemoData={true} passed as a prop to CardWrapper,
+ * which OVERRIDES any child-reported state. This is why cards with live data
+ * must be removed from this set.
+ *
+ * For cards that use StackContext or other dynamic data sources, use
+ * useCardDemoState({ requires: 'stack' | 'agent' | 'backend' }) to determine
+ * if demo data should be used, then report via useReportCardDataState.
  */
 export const DEMO_DATA_CARDS = new Set([
   // MCS cards - demo until MCS is installed

-  // These cards will show Demo badge only when global demo mode is enabled
-  'llmd_benchmarks',
-  'llmd_ai_insights',
+  // Note: LLM-d cards (llmd_flow, kvcache_monitor, epp_routing, pd_disaggregation, llmd_benchmarks, llmd_ai_insights)
+  // removed - they now use StackContext for live data and report isDemoData via useReportCardDataState
   // Note: llmd_configurator NOT in demo list - shows real llm-d presets from the project
   // Provider health card uses real data from /settings/keys + useClusters()
   // Only shows demo data when getDemoMode() is true (handled inside the hook)
